# Phase 4 — perimeter-target annotation applies direction to one
# perimeter edge and isn't dormant. Exercises:
#   - annotation-json directive (parse + append to input.annotations)
#   - annotations directive (dormant indices report)
#   - perimeter-target resolver round-trip through the pipeline

polygon outer
0,0
240,0
240,160
0,160
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

annotation-json
[{"kind":"Direction","target":{"on":"Perimeter","loop":{"kind":"Outer"},"start":2,"end":3,"t":0.5},"traffic":"OneWay"}]
----
annotation-json: +1

generate
----
total_stalls: 62
dormant_annotations: [0: perimeter projection failed for edge VertexId(2)→VertexId(3) at t=0.5000]

annotations
----
direction on=perimeter loop=outer edge=2→3 t=0.50 traffic=one-way

snapshot
----
